name: Pumpkin Pie Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, rolled oats, 1/2 cup brown sugar, and 1/2 cup butter.
2. Mix until crumbly using an electric mixer on low speed.
3. Press the mixture into an ungreased 9 x 13 pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes.
5. In a separate bowl, combine pumpkin puree, evaporated milk, eggs, granulated sugar, salt, cinnamon, cloves, and ginger.
6. Beat well and pour over the crust in the prepared pan.
7. Return to oven and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for an additional 20 minutes.
8. Combine pecans, 1/2 cup brown sugar, and 2 tablespoons butter.
9. Sprinkle over the pumpkin filling.
10. Bake until the filling is set, about 15 to 20 more minutes.
11. Allow to cool in the pan before cutting into 2-inch squares.
12. Makes 2 dozen.
